tasks.title: Implement self-vs-peer hot-change attribution before rendering another-agent warning while preserving privacy boundaries.
tasks.verification: Implemented self-vs-peer attribution in appendRecencyRecommendation through optional `workerSessionId` and `currentSessionId`. Missing identity still falls back conservatively to peer-style warning. Exported `_test` seam for deterministic coverage without exposing peer-private details.
tasks.summary: Updated hot recency recommendation logic to distinguish self-owned from peer-owned work when session identity is available.
tasks.implementation_summary: Updated hot recency recommendation logic to distinguish self-owned from peer-owned work when session identity is available.

tasks.title: Add failing status/session regression for caller-owned hot change rendered as self-owned and peer-owned change still warning appropriately.
tasks.verification: Added failing-then-green self-vs-peer regression for hot recency recommendations. Red phase: no `_test.appendRecencyRecommendation` seam/self attribution. Green: self-owned hot change says `you are the active worker`; peer-owned hot change preserves `another agent`; self rec does not contain `another agent`.
tasks.summary: Added status test for caller-owned vs peer-owned hot change recommendation wording.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added status test for caller-owned vs peer-owned hot change recommendation wording.

tasks.title: Run focused status/session tests and plugin check; document verification evidence.
tasks.verification: pnpm vitest run src/tools/status.test.ts --reporter=verbose; pnpm run check

proposal.approval_evidence: Approved via structured ADV_ATC_RESPONSE on GitHub issue #95.

discovery.approval_evidence: Discovery completed from issue #95 and session attribution scope. Caller-owned work must be framed as self-owned, while peer-owned warnings remain. No conflict or tradeoff found.

design.approval_evidence: Design completed autonomously. Plan adds self-vs-peer attribution tests and fixes rendering while preserving privacy and peer warnings. No HITL tradeoff, conflict, or contract compromise.

planning.approval_evidence: Planning approved via structured ADV_ATC_RESPONSE on GitHub issue #95.

execution.approval_evidence: Execution complete. Added self-vs-peer hot change attribution in recency recommendation helper using optional worker/current session IDs. Self-owned hot work says `you are the active worker`; peer/unknown identity preserves conservative `another agent` warning. Verification: `pnpm vitest run src/tools/status.test.ts --reporter=verbose` passed (26 tests); `pnpm run check` passed.

acceptance.approval_evidence: Batch acceptance approved via GH ATC_RESPONSE for all bug changes

release.approval_evidence: Batch release approved via GH ATC_RESPONSE for all bug changes
